title: campyloneurum abruptum
intro: Campyloneurum abruptum, also known as the abrupt fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Polypodiaceae, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to aid in reducing pain and inflammation, as well as protecting against cell damage. The health benefits of Campyloneurum abruptum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce stress and anxiety, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is sometimes combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
